text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: pgollucci->portmgr

Request Repo copy 

Sorry marcus, due to historical reasons, can I ask for a simple 'mv'
net-mgmt/net-snmp55 -> net-mgmt/net-snmp-devel

Its not connected to the build yet, and the 'force commit' hasn't been
done yet either, so it really should just be an 'mv'.

Sorry again.
